name: Chime Credit Builder Secured Visa Credit Card
perks: No annual fee, no interest charges, no minimum security deposit required
Secured by your own money moved into a Credit Builder account
No hard credit check to apply
Reports to all three major credit bureaus monthly
Safer Credit Building: automatic on-time payment from Credit Builder balance each month
SpotMe eligible (if enrolled) can cover small overdrafts
Chime members with qualifying direct deposit can access early paycheck
drawbacks: Must have a Chime checking account with at least one qualifying direct deposit
Credit limit equals whatever you move into Credit Builder account (no floor or ceiling)
Not a traditional credit card - no credit limit separate from deposited funds
Chime is a financial technology company, not an FDIC-insured bank itself
Cannot be used for certain purchases (money orders, wire transfers)
